milestones.name: MVP — Core Terminal
milestones.description: Basic working app: projects, sessions, terminal rendering

features.name: Tauri + React scaffold
features.description: Initialize Tauri v2 project with React + TypeScript + Tailwind

features.name: PTY manager
features.description: Rust PTY manager using portable-pty: spawn, read, write, resize, kill

features.name: xterm.js integration
features.description: Terminal rendering with xterm.js, connected to PTY via Tauri IPC

features.name: Sidebar project tree
features.description: Sidebar with project list, session list, add/remove/rename

features.name: Session switching
features.description: Click session in sidebar to switch active terminal

features.name: Config persistence
features.description: Save/load project layout from ~/.terma/config.json

features.name: Keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Cmd+N, Cmd+W, Cmd+1-9, Cmd+Up/Down for navigation

features.name: Dark theme
features.description: Default dark theme with Catppuccin-inspired colors

features.name: Quick switch (Cmd+P)
features.description: Fuzzy finder popup for fast session switching across projects

features.name: Context menus
features.description: Right-click context menus on projects and sessions

features.name: Drag and drop reorder
features.description: Reorder sessions within projects and projects in sidebar

features.name: Project colors
features.description: Assign accent colors to projects for visual grouping

features.name: Sidebar resize
features.description: Draggable divider between sidebar and terminal panel

features.name: Confirm on close
features.description: Warn before closing a session with a running process

features.name: Window state persistence
features.description: Remember window size and position between launches

features.name: Settings panel
features.description: In-app settings UI for font, theme, shell, shortcuts

features.name: Light theme
features.description: Light theme option with Catppuccin Latte colors

features.name: Custom themes
features.description: Load custom theme JSON files from ~/.terma/themes/

features.name: Per-session shell override
features.description: Allow different shells per session (bash, zsh, fish, etc.)

features.name: Configurable keybindings
features.description: Allow users to customize keyboard shortcuts

milestones.name: Power User — Advanced Features
milestones.description: Features for power users and productivity

features.name: Split panes
features.description: Split terminal panel horizontally or vertically within a session

features.name: Search in terminal
features.description: Cmd+F to search terminal scrollback buffer

features.name: Session templates
features.description: Save a project's session layout as a template, apply to new projects

features.name: Startup commands
features.description: Auto-run a command when a session starts (e.g., 'npm run dev')

features.name: Session status indicators
features.description: Show if a process is running, exited, or errored in the sidebar

features.name: macOS build + notarization
features.description: Signed and notarized macOS build (.dmg)

features.name: Windows build
features.description: Windows installer (.msi) with WebView2

features.name: Linux build
features.description: Linux packages (.deb, .AppImage)

features.name: Auto-updater
features.description: In-app update notifications and download via Tauri updater

features.name: Homebrew formula
features.description: Install via 'brew install terma'

features.name: Comprehensive test suite
features.description: Unit tests (Rust), component tests (React), integration tests

future_ideas.name: SSH remote sessions
future_ideas.description: Connect to remote servers and group remote sessions by host

future_ideas.name: Plugin system
future_ideas.description: Extend Terma with community plugins (themes, status bar widgets, etc.)

future_ideas.name: Session sharing
future_ideas.description: Share a terminal session with a teammate (read-only or collaborative)

future_ideas.name: AI integration
future_ideas.description: Inline AI assistant for command suggestions and error explanations

future_ideas.name: Workspace files
future_ideas.description: .terma.json workspace files in project dirs for team-shared layouts

future_ideas.name: Notifications
future_ideas.description: OS notifications when a long-running command completes in a background session
